title: PFAS, Fluoride, and BPA Are Disrupting Thyroid Function at the Population Level
description: PFAS, fluoride, perchlorate, BPA, and pesticides are conducting a coordinated chemical assault on thyroid function at the population level. The regulatory framework designed to stop them was never built for the job.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Poisoned Well: Industrial Chemicals and the Slow-Motion Assault on Your Thyroid
